title: Skeleton Drops OP Loot
description: Turn skeletons into an overpowered loot source for intense and rewarding combat.
body:
The Skeleton is OP datapack upgrades skeletons in Minecraft to become powerful and highly rewarding enemies. When defeated, skeletons can drop overpowered items, enchanted gear, or rare resources, turning every bow fight into a valuable opportunity.

This datapack adds exciting risk-and-reward gameplay to survival mode while keeping core vanilla mechanics intact. It’s perfect for challenge worlds, multiplayer servers, or chaotic survival runs.

Features

Skeletons drop OP items and rare loot

Enchanted weapons, armor, and valuable resources included

Makes nighttime and cave combat more rewarding

Fun survival challenge experience

Compatible with vanilla gameplay

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
